query:
SELECT 
  SUM(duration) as total_duration_minutes,
  SUM(duration) / 60 as total_duration_hours,
  COUNT(*) as stream_count
FROM brand_livestreams 
WHERE liver_id = (SELECT id FROM livers WHERE name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%' LIMIT 1)
AND livestream_date >= '2025-12-01' 
AND livestream_date < '2026-01-01';
